summary: All three bug-fix requirements verified end-to-end. Backend /api/entries returns exactly 3 entries with correct titles; the Lagos entry contains all five required phrases (Roma Termini, senhora americana, dois amigos, primeira etapa, Lisboa–Madrid). No entry mentions Paris, Eiffel, or Hendaye. /api/places returns 23 places with FR cities = [Hendaye, Lyon]. Frontend source grep confirms zero Paris/Eiffel references in /app/frontend/src and /app/frontend/app. countries.ts FR.image uses pexels-photo-2901214 (Lyon). (tabs)/index.tsx STORY_IMG uses photo-11461447, no longer photo-1502602898657. Mobile UI test on https://alberto-rails.preview.emergentagent.com confirms Home renders new STORY_IMG, Diary tab shows the 3 new cards, and the Lagos detail screen shows the required new text.
critical_code_review_comments: Non-blocking: console warnings observed on web preview — "'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'" and "props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents". Pre-existing, unrelated to this bug fix.
Non-blocking: Expo SDK packages slightly out of expected versions (expo@54.0.34 vs ~54.0.35, expo-font@14.0.11, expo-router@6.0.23). Cosmetic warning, app boots fine.
seed_data_creation: None — verified existing seeded entries via public API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_alberto_bugfix.py covers: 3-entry seed, Lagos text phrases, no-Paris/Eiffel/Hendaye in entries, FR entry uses Lyon image, 23 places with FR=[Hendaye,Lyon], static greps on countries.ts and index.tsx. Run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_alberto_bugfix.py -v.
rca_of_issue: Not applicable — this iteration verified completed fixes. All requested changes were already correctly applied by the main agent: DB reseeded with new SAMPLE_ENTRIES, countries.ts FR image swapped to Pexels Lyon photo 2901214, STORY_IMG swapped to photo-11461447.
